prompt: App icon on pure black background. Bold flat vector design. Two crab claws forming eyeglasses - left claw is the left lens frame, right claw is the right lens frame, connected at center bridge. Claws are exaggerated and clearly crab-like with pointed tips. Inside left lens: a bold downward-pointing chevron/caret symbol (like a V shape, which is a > rotated 90 degrees clockwise). Inside right lens: a bold horizontal bar/dash (which is a vertical bar | rotated 90 degrees clockwise). Uniform thick strokes throughout. Neon green on pure black, minimal tight glow. Flat vector style, no gradients. Must read clearly at small sizes.
